response.justification: While this candidate demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals and professional breadth, they are fundamentally misaligned with the role requirements. Most critically, they lack native Japanese language proficiency, a stated required qualification. Their career has focused almost entirely on web and full-stack development (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang), with their most recent 7+ years in high-level application development. There is no evidence of embedded systems, firmware development, kernel-level Linux work, or expertise in the required security technologies (encryption, authentication systems, tamper detection) and networking protocols (Layer-2/3, SNMP, NETCONF). Their brief C/C++ experience ended in 2015.
strengths: Demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals with 15+ years of professional experience across diverse domains and platforms
Proven expertise in DevOps, infrastructure, and complex system deployments (Docker, CI/CD, GitLab administration, high-performance backend services)
Consistent commitment to code quality and testing practices (TDD, software craftsmanship, mentorship on testing methodologies)
concerns: Critical gap: No native Japanese language proficiency listed (required qualification for the role)
Career trajectory focused on web and full-stack development; no embedded systems, firmware, security engineering, or kernel-level work in recent history

No demonstrated expertise in required security technologies (encryption/key exchange, authentication systems, tamper detection) or networking domains (Layer-2/3 protocols, network switches, SNMP, NETCONF)

key_factors.factor: No embedded systems or firmware background
No security or networking domain expertise
